summary: Implemented accessibility support (US-032): Added skip-to-main navigation link in shell with visually-hidden-until-focused styles. Added global :focus-visible styles for links and tabindex elements. Added aria-label to rerun button. Added aria-labelledby with h2 ids to all module sections (OSINT, Shadow Profile, Threat Model, Hardening) and role/aria-label to Permission Debt. Added role=status and aria-live=polite to intro overlay for screen reader announcements. Fixed test type errors (ThreatFinding.ruleId and valid ThreatCategory values). All 56 accessibility tests pass, lint and typecheck clean. One pre-existing failure in us-034/main-smoke.test.ts is unrelated (confirmed fails without changes).
